promotion_rule: Person and business records stay in review until a human confirms the source issue, the identity, and any related location link. Issue metadata must remain visible to reviewers.

claim_boundary.verified_fact: The newspaper issue metadata is a verified source record, and a business record may be confirmed only when the page explicitly states it.
claim_boundary.source_based_inference: Person-to-place or business-to-location links remain inference until a reviewer promotes them.
claim_boundary.fictional_gameplay: No fictional gameplay identities belong in the community review queue.

source_issues.citation: Daily Texarkana Democrat, Vol. 10, No. 98, Ed. 1, December 20, 1893, page 3 of 4, Portal to Texas History.
source_issues.ocr_excerpt: A. S. Blythe. Texarkana. Ark. ... H. T. Huey Proprietor.
source_issues.notes: This issue page is used as a normalized source-issue adapter seed for community review. It exposes newspaper issue metadata separately from the underlying source record.

people.notes: The issue page names A. S. Blythe in OCR. The record stays in review until a reviewer confirms the person identity and any person-to-place link.

businesses.notes: The issue page explicitly advertises the business and names H. T. Huey as proprietor. The location link remains separate until the map/location side confirms it.
